def negative_json_encoder_recreated_per_item():
    rule_id = "json_encoder_recreated_per_item"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "A JSON encoder object is recreated per item instead of being reused for the stream."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
